description: Predictive Pod Autoscaler — Production SRE Dashboard

panels.title: Traffic vs Scaling Reaction  —  RPS (left)  /  Replicas (right)
Error Rate %  —  SLA thresholds at 1% and 3%

panels.description: When PPA is working correctly, the gap between Desired (yellow) and Ready (green) approaches zero because pods are pre-scaled before demand arrives.
panels.title: HPA Scaling Behavior  —  Desired vs Ready  (gap = cold-start lag PPA eliminates)

panels.description: HPA (yellow) reacts to current CPU. PPA t10m (blue) reacts to predicted RPS. Actual (green) shows who is winning.
panels.title: HPA vs PPA (t10m) vs Actual Replicas

panels.description: Each prediction is shifted forward by its horizon using offset -10m so it aligns with the actual RPS at the time it was targeting. Tight overlap = accurate model. Orange dashed = what the model said 10m ago would happen now.
panels.title: t10m Prediction vs What Actually Happened (time-aligned)

targets.legendFormat: t10m Prediction (made 10m ago, shifted forward to align)

panels.description: Positive = HPA wants more pods than PPA. Negative = PPA wants more. Zero = agreement.
panels.title: Scaling Gap — HPA desired − PPA desired

panels.description: Orange dashed = what PPA predicted 10 minutes ago (offset 10m). Blue = what actually happened. Tight overlap = good LSTM.
panels.title: t+10 Accuracy — Prediction from 10 minutes ago vs Actual RPS now

panels.description: Raw desired (grey dashed) = ceil(predicted * safety / capacity). Inflated (orange dashed) = predicted * safety. Final (blue) = after rate-limiting and min/max clamping.
panels.title: PPA Internals — Safety Factor, Rate Limiting, Clamping
All-Model Prediction Comparison — t3m vs t5m vs t10m (shadow)

panels.description: All 3 predictions are shifted forward to the time they were targeting (offset -3m, -5m, -10m) so they land on the actual RPS they were trying to predict. Tight overlap with the blue line = good model. Use this to compare which horizon tracks reality best.
panels.title: All Models vs Actual RPS — predictions shifted forward to align with actual

options.content:
## Champion Model Quality Summary (eval on held-out test set)

| Horizon | sMAPE | MAPE | MAE (req/s) | RMSE (req/s) | PPA Under-prov% | Replica Savings% |
|---------|-------|------|-------------|--------------|-----------------|------------------|
| **rps_t3m** (observer) | 10.47 | 12.94 | 21.18 | 36.80 | 15.79% | −0.86% |
| **rps_t5m** (observer) | 7.33 | 8.00 | 14.49 | 22.29 | 15.42% | +0.81% |
| **rps_t10m** ★ active | **6.72** | **6.84** | **12.29** | **18.97** | **10.30%** | **+0.44%** |

> ★ t10m is the active scaler. t3m and t5m run in observer mode (predict only, do not scale).

panels.title: Champion Model Eval Summary (offline test set)

title: PPA — Predictive Pod Autoscaler Monitor
